events.description: The task instructions on the screen are being dynamically updated, clearing the initial screen sharing setup text and revealing a new task scenario about booking a domestic flight in Australia.

events.description: A loading modal appears on the results page with the message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!'.
User waits for the flight search results to populate while the loading modal is active, showing various airline logos.

events.description: The loading overlay disappears, revealing the flight search results page.
User hovers the cursor near the 'EDIT SEARCH' button immediately after the results load.
User pauses to review the listed flight options in the search results.
events.frame_description: The screen displays multiple flight options from Adelaide to Melbourne with prices and airline logos.

events.description: User moves the cursor to the filters sidebar on the left side of the page, specifically near the 'Airlines' section.
User is examining the flight search results and filtering options for a trip from Adelaide to Melbourne.
events.frame_description: The screen shows a list of available flights with details like departure time, airline, and price. A sidebar on the left contains filters for stops, departure times, and airlines.

events.description: Fare options (Lite, Choice) are displayed for the selected flight

events.description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare option

events.description: User examines the inbound flight search results, comparing options from Virgin Australia and Jetstar.

events.description: The UI updates to display fare selection options (Lite, Choice, Flex) for the 12:10pm flight.

events.description: A loading overlay appears with the message 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...', indicating the system is processing the selection.
events.frame_description: A white loading screen with a blue spinner is visible.

events.description: User waits while the 'All Set!' loading overlay is displayed, indicating the flight selection is being processed.
events.frame_description: A loading overlay with the text 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' is visible over the dimmed flight results page.

events.description: The page navigates to the baggage selection and trip review section, as seen by the URL change to #baggage.
User dwells on the 'Review trip' page, likely examining the flight itinerary and the total price summary.
events.frame_description: The 'Review trip' page is fully loaded, displaying departing and returning flight details, price summary, and available add-ons like baggage and seats.

events.description: User dwells on the 'Review trip' page, likely reading the flight summary details.
User scrolls down the page to view the 'Add-ons' and 'Baggage' sections, then quickly returns to the top.
User dwells with the cursor over the departing flight details after returning to the top of the page.
User dwells on the departing flight details in the 'Review trip' section, likely reviewing the flight times and airline information.
events.frame_description: The screen shows the 'Review trip' page with flight details for a trip from Adelaide to Melbourne.

events.description: User scrolls down the page, bringing the 'Add-ons' and 'Seats' sections into better view.
events.frame_description: The page content shifts upwards as the user scrolls.

events.description: User moves the cursor to the right sidebar and dwells on the 'Why book online with us?' section, possibly reading the benefits listed.
events.interaction_target: Why book online with us? section

events.description: User scrolls down the page to view the 'Add-ons' section including Baggage and Seats.

events.description: User pauses to review the baggage information and seat selection options.

events.description: User dwells on the 'SELECT SEATS' button, likely considering whether to select seats.
User pauses briefly with the cursor near the 'CONTINUE' button before proceeding.
User clicks the 'CONTINUE' button to proceed to the next step of the booking process.
A loading overlay with the message 'Thanks for confirming your flights' and a spinner appears while the next page loads.

events.description: The page navigates to the traveller details entry screen.
User waits on the loading screen while the system confirms flight details.
The browser navigates from the baggage/confirmation page to the traveller details entry page.
The traveller details page content loads progressively, displaying the price summary and then the 'Adult 1' information form.
events.frame_description: Price summary and form fields appear on the screen.

events.description: User pauses to examine the newly loaded traveller details form and the 'Heads up!' notification.
User dwells on the 'Travellers' details page of the Flight Centre booking flow, likely reviewing the form fields.
User switches browser tabs from the Flight Centre booking page to an Askable feedback session tab.
events.frame_description: The screen changes from the Flight Centre website to a dark overlay screen with feedback questions.

events.description: User dwells on the Askable feedback screen which asks 'What's making you hesitate there'.
User is reading the prompt 'What's making you hesitate there' on the Askable session page.
events.frame_description: The screen shows a dark interface with the text 'What's making you hesitate there' and an 'Open' button.

events.description: The prompt text on the screen updates to 'Thank you for working through that. Shall we move on to the next part?'
events.frame_description: The central text on the page changes as the session progresses.

events.description: User is reading the prompt from the AI moderator: 'Thank you for working through that. Shall we move on to the next part?'
events.frame_description: The screen shows a dark interface with a central message from an AI moderator and an 'Open' button.
